body.title: day-close: create new GitHub Discussion per day
body.result: day-close Step 10 now creates new GitHub Discussion per day (Repo R_kgDORR89gw, category General); slateclose Step 3 updated to post there too
body.description: day-close creates a new GitHub Discussion (not a comment on #62) echoing the day slate — tickets opened/closed, decisions made, notes captured. #62 stays as master plan/roadmap thread.
